record.title: Lester Crocker, 1973-07-12, Interview - MP3 Recording
record.subject: Latah County -- Idaho
record.origin: Parents came from Pennsylvania and Kansas (early 1890's)
record.keywords: doctors roads forest fires schools hunting fishing blacksmiths wagons childhood winter post offices

point.title: Birth in Kendrick; rural doctor; dirt roads; weather
point.synopsis: Born in Kendrick, horse-and-buggy doctor. Dirt and mud roads. Weather.

point.title: Forest fires and firefighting; how 1930s fire in Kendrick started; 1904 fire created a tent city in Kendrick
point.synopsis: Forest fires and firefighting. Smokechasers and lookouts. Saddleponies and packstring to get to a fire. Fire around Kendrick in 1930's started by train in Little Bear Canyon. 1904 Kendrick fire, business section sets up in tents

point.title: Hunting and fishing; Eating a vareity of fish and wildlife
point.synopsis: Hunting and fishing. Plentiful game in early days. Fires helped habitat for big game. Lester's family ate lots of wild meat. Fish were plentiful. Steelhead and rainbows. Fishing trips on the Potlatch.

point.title: Father's business; changes to the blacksmith business with arrival of automobile
point.synopsis: Father was a carriage-maker and blacksmith. Retired to a gunshop. Blacksmith business kind of fizzled out with arrival of automobiles.

point.title: Lester in a runaway wagon as a child
point.synopsis: Runaways. Lester in a runaway wagon as a child.

point.title: Weather change from early times. Kids winter games. Cutting ice and icehouses
point.synopsis: Weather change from early times. Kids winter games. Cutting ice and icehouses.

point.title: Information about Icehouses; ice in the summer time
point.synopsis: Icehouses (continued). Buying ice all summer, making ice cream.

point.title: Weekend fishing trips. Bicycling then walking. Salting fish
point.synopsis: Weekend fishing trips. Bicycling then walking. Salting fish.

point.title: Delivering mail on American Ridge; winter weather during mail delivery
point.synopsis: Carrying the mail on American Ridge. Automobile by summer, team by winter. Snow sometimes too deep for teams. Driving through fields when the road is drifted in.

record.description: Local fires. Weather and transportation. Wild game. 7-12-73 .8 hr RM
record.transcript: Download the PDF Index No transcript available.
record.rights: Digital format copyright: University of Idaho Library. Original Copyright: Latah County Historical Society
